merlin_thesis: NAS100 pullback from ATH (30,776) continues into Day 3 — price at 30,154 after sweeping SSL at 30,018 on H4. D1 structure remains BULLISH (HH/HL) but price is deep in daily premium (140.5% of stale DR 28,596→29,705). Provisional DR (28,596→30,776) puts price at 71.4% — still premium. H4 is in DISCOUNT (24.7% of 30,018→30,569), which is where longs should be sought in a bullish trend. M15 shows no Kill Zone active (between sessions), bearish OB at 30,078-30,110, bullish OBs at 30,085-30,148. The 30,000 level is critical — if held, this pullback is a healthy discount accumulation; if broken with displacement, targets 29,848→29,676. Bias: NEUTRAL-BEARISH short-term (pullback active), but macro trend remains BULLISH.
